generic: Narrow and hemmed in, with few exits and less room to maneuver.
Wide and open, with no cover and every sightline exposed.
A natural choke point — whoever holds it controls the flow.
Cluttered and broken, full of things to trip on or hide behind.
A threshold between one kind of space and another.
Elevated above what's around it. A view, and a target.
Below the surrounding ground. Hard to see into, hard to see out of.
Full of bystanders who may or may not want to get involved.
